Hero.description: Algeria's most rigorous <highlight>IELTS course</highlight> is launching in <highlight>Oran</highlight>, built for the computer-delivered test, not outdated paper practice.
Hero.noPayment: No upfront payment required to apply.

Methodology.title: The Methodology
Methodology.subtitle: Most IELTS preparation is inefficient because it fails to reflect the digital reality of the official test. We do things differently:
Methodology.bullet1Desc: Train exactly how you will test on exam day.
Methodology.bullet2Desc: We pinpoint your specific language gaps instead of offering generic tutoring.
Methodology.bullet3Desc: Your study plan is engineered exclusively around the official marking rubrics.

Facility.title: The Facility
Facility.subtitle: Located in Bir El Djir. A quiet, secure environment engineered for deep focus and diagnostic training.

FAQ.title: Frequently Asked Questions
FAQ.q1: What is the difference between Paper-Based and Computer-Based IELTS?
FAQ.a1: The test format and difficulty are identical, but the delivery mechanism changes everything. On a PC, you have copy-paste functionality, automatic word counts, and digital highlighting. Our facility replicates this exact interface with dedicated hardware so you build the right muscle memory before test day.
FAQ.q2: How can I pay my official test registration fee in Algeria?
FAQ.a2: The British Council fee is typically around 40,000 DZD. Due to local banking constraints, most candidates pay via offline bank transfer or specialized local agencies. We provide step-by-step guidance on securing your test date and handling the payment securely.
FAQ.q3: Is this course suitable for complete beginners in English?
FAQ.a3: No. This is an elite, intensive sprint designed strictly for university applicants and immigration candidates who already possess an intermediate grasp of English. We diagnose your exact weaknesses and focus purely on practical exam strategies and time management.
FAQ.q4: How do your class groups protect individual learning progress?
FAQ.a4: We enforce a strict physical boundary of only 8 seats per cohort. This ensures that every single candidate receives intensive, line-by-line correction of their essays and personalized speaking feedback directly from a Band 8.0 instructor.
FAQ.q5: Can I join this program if I am facing an imminent Capago or TLScontact visa deadline?
FAQ.a5: Absolutely. Visa dossier timelines for Campus France, UK Student Visas, and Canada Express Entry are unforgiving. Our intensive 32-hour program is built precisely for rapid intervention to secure your required language certificate before your consulate appointment.
FAQ.q6: What resources are included in the 32,000 DA tuition fee?
FAQ.a6: The 32,000 DZD tuition covers 32 hours of dedicated PC time in our Oran lab, proprietary diagnostic simulations, structured writing templates, and line-by-line speaking and writing feedback to ensure you hit your target band.
FAQ.q7: When does the Lab open, and how do I know if I got a founding seat?
FAQ.a7: The founding cohort launches once scheduling is finalized — we are targeting the near term. When your seat is confirmed, you will receive a WhatsApp message directly from Amine with the exact date, time, and payment instructions. If you have not heard back, your application is still under review — we process in the order applications were received.

About.title: About Amine
About.subtitle: The Founder & Lead Instructor
About.hook: Amine is the Founder of IELTS Lab Oran, a 23-year-old Master's student in Applied AI, and an expert IELTS instructor holding an official Band 8.0.
About.pedigree: Driven by the profound dedication to education left by his late father, a respected professor at USTO-MB.
About.experience: Extensive teaching background across premier local institutions (MTI Metro, CEIL Univ Oran 1, Snai3i) and active volunteer work at the American Corner Oran. Specialized STEAM and STEM teacher training credentials from World Learning Algeria and Snai3i.
About.edge: A highly pragmatic and realistic approach. No toxic positivity—just actionable roadmaps. Backed by years of dedicated English teaching, informal IELTS coaching, and deep insider knowledge gained from shadowing official CEIL IELTS sessions to reverse-engineer the perfect curriculum.
About.method: A system built on rigorous diagnostics and maximizing active speaking time, ensuring every minute translates into measurable progress.

Articles.title: Articles & News
Articles.article1Title: The Official Switch to IELTS on Computer
Articles.article1Text: We are pleased to announce that from 30 April 2026, all IELTS tests will be delivered exclusively on computer, providing a faster, more efficient, and streamlined testing experience. IELTS on computer offers the same test format, questions, and scoring as IELTS on paper. It also provides significant benefits at no additional cost:
